title: herniaria hirsuta var. incana
intro: Herniaria hirsuta var. incana, also known as hairy sweet cicely, is a perennial plant in the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae). It is primarily used in traditional medicine for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve coughs, and soothe digestive issues, making it a valuable remedy for respiratory and gastrointestinal health. Herniaria hirsuta var. incana can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its health benefits, which include alleviating bronchitis, asthma, and stomach issues.
